subject: Invoice Payment Confirmation
body: Dear finance team, we have processed the payment for invoice INV-2027-890. Please confirm receipt. Regards, Acme Corp.

subject: New order #ORD-2027-445
body: Hello, a new order has been placed for our premium widget package. Please review and invoice accordingly. Thanks.

subject: Invoice Discrepancy #INV-2027-894
body: Hello, we noticed an overcharge of 500 units on invoice INV-2027-894. Our records show the agreed rate was lower. Could you please review and clarify the billing? We need this corrected before payment. Thank you.
